scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams (orders, products, customers, coupons) only; the broader WooCommerce surface (refunds, shipping, taxes, reports, webhooks, order notes) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /wp-json/wc/v3/orders is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/wp-json/wc/v3/orders/{id} is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
reverse ETL delete not enabled for this connector
/wp-json/wc/v3/refunds is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/wp-json/wc/v3/reports/sales is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
/wp-json/wc/v3/webhooks is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
